prestazioni: Engine swap to a Rover 3.9L V8 (engine code: 3.9L Rover V8, derived from Buick 215) with a forged crankshaft from JE Pistons (8.5:1 compression ratio), paired with a custom camshaft profile from Crower Cams (280° duration, 0.500" lift) for improved low-end torque and off-road responsiveness. The stock intake manifold is replaced with a custom-fabricated aluminum plenum from K&N Engineering, featuring individual throttle bodies (ITBs) for each cylinder, mated to a Holley 4-barrel carburetor (650 CFM) for precise fuel delivery.

Installation of a custom twin-turbo system using Garrett GT2860RS turbos (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a Spearco intercooler (4.5" thick core) and a custom stainless steel exhaust system from MagnaFlow (3.5" diameter, mandrel-bent piping) with a Borla Pro XS muffler for optimized flow and reduced backpressure. The turbo system is managed by a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom tune from Dyno Dynamics to handle boost levels up to 12 psi while maintaining reliability.

Upgraded drivetrain components including a Quaife ATB differential (front and rear) for improved off-road traction, a reinforced R380 manual transmission from a Range Rover Classic with a short-throw shifter from Hurst Performance, and a custom transfer case from Advance Adapters (2.72:1 low-range gear ratio) for extreme off-road crawling capability. The stock axles are replaced with heavy-duty Dana 44 front and rear axles (4.56:1 gear ratio) from Currie Enterprises, paired with ARB Air Locker differentials for maximum articulation.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using fiberglass fender flares from Extreme Dimensions (2.5" wider than stock), paired with a custom front bumper from ARB (winch-ready, with integrated LED light bar mounts) and a rear bumper from TJM (with swing-out tire carrier and dual jerry can holders). The entire body is coated in a custom matte military green wrap from 3M (2080 series) with a textured finish for durability.

Suspension lift kit from Old Man Emu (OME) (3" lift with heavy-duty coils and Nitrocharger Sport shocks), paired with custom-fabricated steel bumpers from Poison Spyder (with integrated rock sliders and tow hooks). The wheels are 17" Method MR701 beadlock wheels (8x17, +35 offset) wrapped in BFGoodrich KM3 tires (35x12.50R17) for maximum off-road grip and sidewall durability.

Interior overhaul featuring Recaro SRD bucket seats (with 4-point harnesses from Schroth Racing), a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (MIG-welded 4130 chromoly tubing), and a full digital dash from Racepak (G2X Pro dash logger) with integrated GPS and data logging. The stock steering wheel is replaced with a Momo Prototipo (380mm diameter) wrapped in Alcantara, paired with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations.
